payload.goal: Portfolio read surface for the multi-initiative record: sofar list (CLI) with one line per initiative (slug, progress, active phase, next action, bound branch); the same listing in the unknown_initiative error path so an unbound branch orients instead of dead-ending; an MCP listing surface per a pre-registered shape decision. Driver: Jul 11 audit — status and get_state resolve exactly ONE initiative; the only all-initiatives surface is serve GET /state. Constraints: read-side derivation over existing folds, zero new event types; MCP surface budget-boxed (count caps + clip budgets); a list is a record read, not a live dashboard (spine D3).

tasks.title: Pre-register the surface shape as a logged decision BEFORE building: MCP shape (get_state view:'initiatives' vs a new sofar_list_initiatives tool), what a list line carries (slug, progress, active phase, next action, bound branch), ordering rule; include why the losing options lose

Listing derivation: per-initiative summary over existing folds + reverse binding map (bindings.json branch→slug inverted); zero new event types; deterministic order; missing/corrupt logs degrade to a warning line, never fatal
sofar list: one line per initiative on the terminal (uncapped surface), fold warnings to stderr
unknown_initiative error path (resolveInitiative, shared by CLI status and MCP): append the available-initiatives listing so an unbound branch orients instead of dead-ending
Expose the listing per the 1.1 decision, budget-boxed: count-capped lines with clip budgets so the context-window cost stays bounded as initiatives accumulate

SPEC §CLI + §MCP tools (+ FORMAT.md only if the listing becomes a conforming-reader concern); acceptance criteria: listing renders all initiatives, unbound-branch error carries the listing, budgets hold
Tests: derivation determinism (same records → deep-equal listing), CLI render, error-path listing, MCP count/clip budgets, empty .sofar/initiatives edge

payload.cmd: git add .sofar/initiatives/notes-in-digest && git commit -m "record: session drift — audit Q&A + initiative-list setup, second-session wrap events" && git add .sofar/initiatives/cli-ui && git commit -m "record: new initiative cli-ui — CLI-UX bucket seeded with the new-rebind footgun note (no plan yet)" && git checkout -b initiative-list && sofar switch initiative-list && git status --short

payload.chose: Listing shape (pre-registered, 1.1): MCP surface = get_state view:"initiatives" (no new tool); CLI surface = new `sofar list` command; a list line carries slug, bound branch(es) via reverse bindings map, progress (done/total tasks), active phase, clipped next action; ordered by last event ulid descending (record recency), initiatives with empty/unreadable logs last by slug asc; unknown_initiative errors from resolveInitiative append a count-capped available-initiatives line
payload.over: (a) a new sofar_list_initiatives MCP tool; (b) CLI-only listing with no MCP surface; (c) slug-alphabetical ordering
payload.because: an 8th tool grows every session's cached tool-definition prefix for a rarely-issued query, while get_state already owns progressive disclosure (digest/full) — a third view is its natural axis and needs no initiative resolution, which is exactly the unbound-branch case the feature exists for; CLI-only leaves MCP agents dead-ended except via the error path; recency-first is the resume-relevant order ("which initiative was live?") and stays deterministic because it derives from ulids already in the record — alphabetical discards that signal

sofar status cli-ui 2>&1 | head -10

payload.next_action: Seed the cli-ui plan: pick rendering approach (Decision on any color/TUI dep) and phase out the surfaces (status, doctor, new/switch).

payload.text: Dogfooding concurrency finding (2026-07-11, second of its kind after the new-rebind footgun): two agent sessions sharing ONE checkout — a git branch switch by session A silently redirects session B's branch-resolved appends onto A's initiative (three events landed here, voided by corrections). openSessionFileConflicts cannot see it (no shared files). Candidate fix: session-pinned initiative resolution — a session's appends resolve to the initiative captured at session_started, branch is only the default at start; hooks would need the session→initiative map from the log rather than re-resolving per event.

for p in ora yocto-spinner nanospinner log-symbols figures boxen picocolors chalk ansis kleur; do
  d="$SP/dep-$p"; mkdir -p "$d"; cd "$d"
  npm install --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund --silent "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1
  n=$(find node_modules -name package.json -maxdepth 3 -not -path '*/node_modules/*/node_modules/*' | grep -c 'node_modules/[^/]*/package.json\|node_modules/@[^/]*/[^/]*/package.json')
  total=$(node -e "const l=require('./package-lock.json');console.log(Object.keys(l.packages).length-1)")
  sz=$(du -sk node_modules | cut -f1)
  echo "$p: total-packages-installed=$total node_modules-size=${sz}KB"
done

payload.summary: Researched CLI UI across Claude Code, Gemini CLI, opencode, Codex, Kiro + Node ecosystem (3 agents). Drafted cli-ui plan: 3 phases/11 tasks (UI kernel, styled surfaces, contract+acceptance). Logged direction decision (styled static output, ANSI-16 semantic law, no TUI framework) and a design-vocabulary note.
payload.next_action: Start 1.1 on a cli-ui branch: settle zero-dep vendored kernel vs picocolors dep, log the Decision, then build cli/ui capability detection (1.2).
